definition: AI and automation are the primary potential offset to demographic headwinds, but the magnitude and timeline remain highly uncertain, with 2023–2025 productivity data showing only modest improvement despite massive investment.
evidence: Actual measured US productivity growth 1.5–2.0% in 2023–2025, only modestly above pre-COVID trend
Diffusion lags could mean the effect arrives later
open_questions: Actual measured TFP growth over next 3–5 years
Whether diffusion lags explain the modest improvement so far
